programme.title: Direct Talk

programme.title: Sumopedia

programme.title: Zero Waste Life

programme.desc: This programme gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia, explaining the day's developments and what is behind them.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Stella Jean has submitted action plans to the council to eliminate discrimination in the Italian fashion industry - in particular, she is struggling to give non-white youths a chance to get jobs.

programme.title: Trailblazers
programme.desc: Fashion designer Morinaga Kunihiko is known for his tech-oriented creations, but his latest collection features hand-sewn patchwork - we cover his physical show at Paris Fashion Week to find out why.

programme.title: Why Democracy - Bloody Cartoons
programme.desc: We look at why 12 drawings in a Danish newspaper could whirl a small country into a confrontation with Muslims all over the world.

programme.title: Cape Gospel Vibes
programme.desc: We showcase gospel music from the community.

programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Sig and Mandy go all in on a change in strategy. But when Jake pulls up a crab jackpot, he must choose whether to follow Sig's orders or go out on his own.

programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Episode 5'. The guys are in Herefordshire to look around a farmer's eclectic collection. Henry sets his sights on a Nuffield tractor, while Sam wants an antique bird scarer.

programme.desc: 'S2/E42 - The Big Ig/Saving Snugglesaurus'. Iggy is the proud caretaker of a berry bog, but must challenge T to a game of Capture the Flag to remain in charge. Rocky has to watch his baby cousin for the day.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E43 - The Singing Chef/ the Dino Drone'. Tiny writes a musical called 'Might Dinosaurs,' but she can't find the right dino to play the lead! Hegan is jealous of Mazu's drone that can fly anywhere in Cretacia.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - The Snow Cave/ Good Dino'. Bill, Mazu and Rocky head to the Frozen Land in search of a snow cave just as a blizzard comes. Tiny wants to create a statue of Cretacia's Greatest Hero out of a big boulder.

programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - Is A Fella Isabella?/ Dudes' Day Off With Daddo'. Henry's friend Roddy rips Summer's autographed pic of pop diva Isabella forcing him to replace it. Henry stays home to be with Daddo, who's sick.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E36'. Who will win the school science fair - Cobby's toast-a-rrific invention or Hildy's doughnut volcano? Henry and Denzel fall out, so Cobby builds him a robot friend.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - The Grr Cloud, Monster Momma's Day'. When Henry has a bad day a Grr Cloud appears over his head. Henry finds the perfect Monster Mama's Day present - a fluffy mini-monster pet.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E38 - Monster Scare Fair/The Roarsville Rovers'. Henry reassures Denzel, who's scared of the spooky Fun House at the Monster Fair. Henry encourages his team when they lose the season's first games.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Seeing Stars/A Tiny Triumph'. Mazu and her three besties map the stars. Tiny's artistic skills are put to use when the dinos are lost in the desert.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Giganto's Laugh/Treasure!'. Tiny and Mazu treat Giganto's toothache. Every dino in Cretacia tries to claim a beautiful pebble!

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster

programme.title: Freeway 1
programme.desc: A 'Little Red Riding Hood', with a teenage juvenile delinquent on the run from a social worker traveling to her grandmother's house and being hounded by a pedophile.

programme.title: Die For A Dollar
programme.desc: After killing his opponent in the ring, a boxer quits fighting, but must face his demons when a sexy woman hires him to find her husband's murderer.

programme.title: Step Up: Year Of The Dance
programme.desc: Youth from different social classes in Beijing come together to form China's best dance crew and learn what it really means to be family.

programme.title: Skiptrace
programme.desc: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle against a notorious Chinese criminal.

programme.title: Traitor
programme.desc: When straight-arrow agent Roy Clayton assumes command of a special FBI task force, he becomes entangled in a web of covert operations.

programme.title: Baja
programme.desc: Four 22 year-olds on a Mexican road trip seem bound for disaster until they, and their trip, are unexpectedly redeemed by a series of miraculous events.

programme.title: Enemy Of The State
programme.desc: In this action thriller Will Smith plays a lawyer who is in way over his head. Murder, corruption and a web of political corruption drive this pulsating conspiracy film.

programme.title: Surrogates
programme.desc: Set in a futuristic world where humans live in isolation and interact through surrogate robots, a cop is forced to leave home to investigate the murders of surrogates.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: A dramatisation of the disaster in April 2010, when the offshore drilling rig called the Deepwater Horizon exploded, resulting in the worst oil spill in American history.

programme.title: Freeway 2: Confessions Of A Trickbaby
programme.desc: A teenage prostitute escapes from a juvenile prison with a 16-year-old serial killer and both go on a destructive road trip to Mexico.

programme.title: How Stella Got Her Groove Back
programme.desc: A sizzling romantic drama starring the lovely Angela Bassett as a successful career woman whose whirlwind holiday romance leaves her torn between her head and heart.

programme.title: Brick Mansions
programme.desc: An undercover Detroit cop navigates a dangerous neighbourhood with the help of an ex-con in order to bring down a crime lord and his plot to devastate the entire city.

programme.title: On The Streets Of LA
programme.desc: An estranged father and son are paroled from the same maximum-security prison with one unusual condition, they must become roommates.

programme.title: Karaoke Man
programme.desc: A comic book illustrator discovers that the costume of an obscure Eastern European superhero supplies him with the courage to sing Karaoke without fear.

programme.title: Enter The Fire
programme.desc: Jake Bolt seeks refuge with his estranged foster brother. As the mafia hunts him down, the two brothers must battle for their lives, while trying not to kill each other in the process.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: A troubled young man enlists in the coast guard, where he's taken in by a renowned rescue swimmer who's hardened by the loss of his team from an accident years back.

programme.title: Gods Of Egypt
programme.desc: Mortal hero Bek teams with the god Horus in an alliance against Set, who has usurped Egypt's throne, plunging the once peaceful and prosperous empire into chaos and conflict.

programme.title: Americano
programme.desc: While backpacking through Europe with his best friend Chris McKinley meets a Spanish beauty Adela and an enigmatic provocateur Riccardo, during ''The Running of the Bulls''.

programme.title: Living & Dying
programme.desc: Four robbers find themselves in a gunfight with the police. One dead and one wounded, the remaining trio takes refuge in a British pub.

programme.desc: A new bespoke show focusing on Qatar, its capital Doha and the biggest event ever for the country: hosting the FIFA Football World Cup in 2022.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Michael Palin revisits his fourth travel series - a journey to explore the Sahara Desert. Fans including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley reflect on his achievement.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Cold Harvest'. Jon and his brother Lee search a vast expanse of tundra - on the hunt for a herd of muskox, Kim and Pierre head deep into the bush in an all-out effort to expand their Yukon trapline.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Michael Palin revisits his fourth travel series - a journey to explore the Sahara Desert. Fans including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley reflect on his achievement.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Down Under: Wilderness Island, Australia'. Ben begins his travels in the remote Wilderness Island, off Australia's north-western cape, to meet a man whose story is as remarkable as the landscape he inhabits.

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: 'S4/E4'. Jonno and Alfie have two weeks to slim down for a family barbecue, Sonal and Surekha go on six-week dieting plans, and Xand finds out which alcoholic drink is worst for calories.

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: 'S4/E5'. In this one-off special ordinary Brits trial popular diets looking to shape up for a wedding, a pool party and a beach holiday. Also, can you sleep your way to weight loss?

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: 'S5/E1'. Laura and Gellner have two weeks to slim down, Aishia and Karlette go on six week diets to lose weight before their joint birthday, and Adain and Gerry want to slim down for a hot tub party in four months.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Michael Palin revisits his fourth travel series - a journey to explore the Sahara Desert. Fans including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley reflect on his achievement.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - India'. Ben Fogle returns to meet his previous contributors who set up home in remote locations. In this episode, he returns to the Exmoor National Park where Simon and Debbie Dawson live.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Fast Telescope'. The largest and most sophisticated radio telescope on the planet was based on geodesic dome designs and the work of 18th-century engineer Jean Marie Jacquard.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E18 - Beware the Wild'. Sue builds a drainage system under her runway. Ricko explores old family land. Jessie sets up camp in Brushkana. The Hailstones go boating.

programme.title: Fearless 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Rob Delaney'. Comedian Rob Delaney joins former Special Forces operative Jason Fox in rural Wales, to take on three daring challenges, including a jump off a 40-metre viaduct.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E10'. Police officers form a human chain as they attempt the dramatic rescue of a family of four during Tropical Storm Imelda, which unleashed record-breaking floods on Texas.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Big Blue'. The big blue is the world's greatest wilderness, far from shore and many kilometres deep. It's a vast marine desert, yet it's home to some of the most spectacular creatures on earth.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Crossrail'. This episode looks at the creation of London's Crossrail network, revealing how taxidermy inspired an engineering breakthrough.

programme.title: Spectacular Earth
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Megawave'. Nazaré in Portugal is the site of the biggest ocean waves ever recorded on Earth. To understand what creates these monsters, plunge beneath the waves to reveal the sprawling landscapes of the seabed.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - To Close For Comfort'. Kim and Pierre turn their attentions to harvesting big game, Mike returns home to discover a cabin in much need of repair, Now in Lutsel K'e, Becky tries to sort out her 'green' team of sled dogs.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Tokyo Skytree'. Revealing how the Tokyo Skytree was constructed, the world's tallest free-standing tower that uses liquid springs and safety glass to withstand earthquakes and high winds.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E11'. In the Philippines, the Taal volcano violently erupts, blasting ash and spewing debris over nearby towns and villages. In Queensland, Australia, a freak hail storm unleashes a destructive assault on residents.

programme.title: Spectacular Earth
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Megawave'. Nazaré in Portugal is the site of the biggest ocean waves ever recorded on Earth. To understand what creates these monsters, plunge beneath the waves to reveal the sprawling landscapes of the seabed.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Canada: Freedom Cove'. Ben heads to the azure seas and pine-covered mountains of Canada, where artistic couple Catherine and Wayne live on a floating island they built themselves.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - To Close For Comfort'. Kim and Pierre turn their attentions to harvesting big game, Mike returns home to discover a cabin in much need of repair, Now in Lutsel K'e, Becky tries to sort out her 'green' team of sled dogs.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Tokyo Skytree'. Revealing how the Tokyo Skytree was constructed, the world's tallest free-standing tower that uses liquid springs and safety glass to withstand earthquakes and high winds.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Canada: Freedom Cove'. Ben heads to the azure seas and pine-covered mountains of Canada, where artistic couple Catherine and Wayne live on a floating island they built themselves.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Discover how engineers bent two Manhattan skyscrapers and then connected them with a sky bridge 700 feet in the air.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. How can a glass dome be built big enough to house a mountain? What happens when a major railway station is completely taken apart and rebuilt - during the rush hour?

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Michael Palin revisits his groundbreaking travel series', and fans, including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley, reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: Ben Fogle: Return To The Wild
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Scotland'. Ben Fogle returns to meet his previous contributors who set up home in remote locations. In this episode, he returns to Scotland to see the Goddard family who live off-grid.

programme.title: Fearless 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Rob Delaney'. Comedian Rob Delaney joins former Special Forces operative Jason Fox in rural Wales, to take on three daring challenges, including a jump off a 40-metre viaduct.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Crossrail'. This episode looks at the creation of London's Crossrail network, revealing how taxidermy inspired an engineering breakthrough.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Australia'. Ben learns to oyster pick, brew beer, trade fish and dance with the locals with voluntary castaway Dave Glasheen on a remote Australian island.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E19 - The New World'. Sue travels to the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge. Ricko hunts moose. Jessie builds a cabin in Brushkana. The Hailstones all gather in Kiwalik.

programme.title: Fearless 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Maya Jama'. Jason Fox - Foxy from SAS: Who Dares Wins - takes Maya Jama out of her comfort zone for scary physical challenges and some heart-to-heart chat.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Delta'. Sue visits the beautiful mangroves of the Sundarbans, home of the Bengal tiger, and meets the villagers who live in fear of an attack.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Green Seas'. From enchanted kelp forests to undersea prairies, the planet's green seas teem with life. They are the most abundant but fiercely competitive places in the ocean to live.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Michael Palin recalls his travels to the Himalaya mountain range in 2004, and his travels into Tibet where he reaches Everest Base Camp.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Tokyo Skytree'. Revealing how the Tokyo Skytree was constructed, the world's tallest free-standing tower that uses liquid springs and safety glass to withstand earthquakes and high winds.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Martin explores French Polynesia through French baguettes and coral wine, and on a Polynesian outrigger canoe. He swims with sharks, investigates Marlon Brando's wildlife programme.

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Comedian and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey Down Under. On the Spirit of the Outback, travelling to Queensland's west, Griff seeks to uncover what makes 'the good life'.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Egypt'. Ben journeys to North Africa to live with American widow Maryanne on the farm she's built on the edge of the Sahara. He discovers why she swapped her city abode for a simpler and tougher way of life.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Down to the Wire'. Bentley goes hunting, determined to find meat for his family, Kim and Pierre set their sights on beaver, an essential source of bait they need for the winter trapping season.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Halley VI Research Station'. We looksat the fully relocatable polar research station in Antarctica called Halley VI, which was inspired by a revolutionary icebreaking ship and ingenious designs for pre-fabricated buildings.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Michael Palin recalls his travels to the Himalaya mountain range in 2004, and his travels into Tibet where he reaches Everest Base Camp.

programme.desc: 'S24/E9 - South Beach Sizzle'. Guy is hitting the hot spots of South Beach, starting with an authentic taqueria. Then, he goes to a German joint cooking standout sauerbraten and currywurst.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E1 - Grocery Grudge Match'. Returning chefs take on their former rivals in three winner-take-all grudge matches worth a guaranteed $5,000 each.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Santa's Day Off'. Three bakers use their own specialities to make gingerbread showpieces that depict Santa enjoying a much-needed day off. Which competitor will make it to the final?

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Mrs Claus' Night Off'. Three teams of master festive bakers and their ice sculptors compete to show off a new side of Mrs. Claus in out-of-this-world cake designs and displays.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S47/E10 - Beat Bobby Flay Battle 2'. In the first round, a mishap leads to an alarming situation. The two remaining champs must make plans for a peculiar popcorn product in the dessert round.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E1 - Grocery Grudge Match'. Returning chefs take on their former rivals in three winner-take-all grudge matches worth a guaranteed $5,000 each.

programme.title: Chopped Junior
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Got Elk?'. Four new young chefs try to impress the judges with a puzzling appetizer basket crowned by a super-cheesy sandwich. The finalists will tackle a watermelon dessert.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E1 - Film Crew Takeout'. Ree Drummond cooks for her kid crew after a day of filming. She makes veggie packed burritos, tortilla soup, s'mores brownies and baked BBQ ribs.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E2 - California Cooking'. The sun is shining, and Ree is doing some California-style cooking. She makes wine-roasted chicken with pistachio pesto pasta and vibrant cauliflower tacos.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Pantry Faves'. Molly Yeh uses pantry ingredients in a budget lunch. She makes harissa-braised chickpeas with feta, yogurt marinated chicken skewers and peanut butter rice squares.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S10/E7 - The Mighty Erie Canal'. Andrew takes a bite out of canal country's tastiest eats, including chicken rigatoni and tomato pie.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S25/E4 - Somewhere Over The Rainbow'. Alex Guarnaschelli and Michael Voltaggio love beating Bobby Flay. Will they pick a seafood aficionado or a fine dining expert to battle Bobby?

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S25/E5 - Beat Bobby Flay: The Musical'. Damaris Phillips and TV host Jaymee Sire hope to strike a victorious chord against Bobby Flay. Will they pick a French chef or a Philadelphia native?

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Molecular Kidstronomy'. The final four kid bakers turn into mad scientists. They use futuristic tools to create gastronomy-inspired desserts. But, who will make it to the final?

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E1 - Extreme British Makeover'. British ex-pat, Lee is on the brink of losing his restaurant, From Across the Pond, in Colleyville, TX. Robert Irvine helps him turn it around.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S24/E10 - Smoked, Grilled And Fried'. This trip, Guy is all about meat. In Miami he's joined by Charles Johnson and they try a charcuterie dishing up wild boar sausage and house-cured bacon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S24/E11 - Cruisin' In Cuba'. Guy visits Cuba, to check out the food scene there. There's coffee lobster and a regional pork plate, followed by a Soviet-style ravioli and chicken Kiev.

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Santa's Christmas Eve'. The remaining baking teams and their ice sculptors create the ultimate night before Christmas cake display featuring Santa Claus, for the $25,000 prize.

programme.title: Holiday Gingerbread Showdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Gingerbread Gremlins Attack'. The three finalists make gingerbread showpieces to mark the 35th anniversary of the Christmas movie Gremlins. Who will win the $25,000 prize?

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S47/E11 - Beat Bobby Flay Battle 4'. In the first round, the chefs make appetisers using pizza bites and caviar. The dessert round features a sugary cereal and a gelatinous stumper.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E2 - Friend Or Foe'. Chefs who just met are pair up and compete against other teams of strangers. The surviving team must choose if they each take $10,000 or face off for $20,000.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S31/E2 - Spice It Up'. Ree Drummond adds variety and spice to some family favourites. She makes spicy garlic bread sloppy Joes and spicy ginger sundaes with five-spice crisps.

programme.desc: 'S31/E1 - First Anniversary'. Ree Drummond celebrates Alex and Mauricio's first wedding anniversary by cooking recipes inspired by their honeymoon in the Maldives.

programme.desc: 'S28/E3 - 16-Min Meals: Cowboy Favorites'. Ree shares yummy 16-minute recipes for cowboys and cowgirls. She makes steak medallions and potatoes, and gnocchi with chorizo and corn.

programme.desc: 'S28/E4 - 3 Apps And A Cocktail'. Ree prepares for cocktail hour with delicious dishes. They include BBQ shrimp cocktail, buffalo chicken meatball skewers and blueberry-basil limeade.

programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Orchoptitron In Love/John Harrington'. When Orchoptitron breaks up with his love - the toaster oven - Peabody and Sherman take it upon themselves to cheer him up by playing The Data Game.

programme.desc: 'S1/E37 - Noddy's Big Build'. Noddy and the townsfolk help to rebuild Clockwork Mouse's house after Jumbo knocks it over. Unfortunately, that house is knocked over too. Can Noddy find a way to build a Jumbo-proof house?

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland

programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Boots'. Jack Sprat steals enchanted boots from the Treasure House and triggers a dangerous Devil Wind that threatens to consume San Lorenzo's treasure.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - The Really Really Big Lie'. Julien concocts an elaborate lie, blaming a giant mega-gecko for ruining a child's birthday party.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...
programme.desc: 'Dreamworks The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants. S1/E9 - Captain Underpants and the Strange Strife of the Smelly Socktopus'. George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Plushythingy'. When Frederic Estes creates the hottest toy in town, the field team must destroy the last remaining one, but they are powerless against its cuteness.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - The Bunker List/The Interns'. Branch bets Guy and Smidge that he can complete his Bunker List in one day. Satin and Chenille get the chance to intern for their idol, Nova Swift.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Boo to You'. Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Postman Pat And The Zooming Zipwire'. Pat and Jess race against time to help build a new zipwire. Pat, Ben and the SDS helicopter have to find the runaway cable.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Postman Pat And The Super Jet Boots'. It's the Festival of Flight - Pat has to deliver special jet boots, but when Ajay accidentally uses them, Cedric the racing pigeon is his only hope.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Raa Raa's Great Big Noise'. Raa Raa decides that the Jingly Jangly Jungle is not 'jingly' or 'jangly' enough, so the animals work together to make a wonderful jingly-jangly noise.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 of 52 - Charley On Safari'. Charley pretends to be different wild animals, but he has no idea what sounds they make, so he heads off on an exciting jungle safari to track down the animals and hear what they really sound like.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 52 - Big Little Charley'. Charley wants to be taller than he is, but when he becomes a giant, he finds he's so big there are a lot of fun things he just can't do anymore. Maybe his normal size is fine after all.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 of 52 - Pop Star Charley'. Charley wants to become a pop star, it all seems perfect. But when he gets on stage, he is overcome with stage fright. But with the help of his friends, Charley puts on a performance to remember.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Postman Pat And The Spring Lamb'. Pat has to deliver a yeti costume for Bill, but when one of Alf's sheep goes missing, Pat realises he has the perfect disguise to bring back the sheep.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Postman Pat And The Painted Sheep'. Pat has to deliver special cans of blue dye for Alf to mark up his runaway sheep, but soon Pat can't find Alf or his sheep! Can Alf's tracking device help?

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Raa Raa's Nap Time Story'. Topsy reads Zebby a nap-time story, but when Raa Raa does the accompanying noises Zebby finds she can't get to sleep.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Go Bananas'. Raa Raa and the other animals have picked loads of bananas for Ooo Ooo's banana party, but can they get them back to her house in time?

programme.title: George Of The Jungle
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Bathroom Of The Apes/Beauty Vs Beasts'. George wishes on a star for more stars to wish on and angry army ants invade the jungle!

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Swiss Mess'. The Wanderers head to Switzerland, where they find Odlulu using the Vacuum Key to steal all the country's chocolate to win The Colossal Festival of Chocolate.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
The Boss Baby: Back In Business

programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Dang You Saved My Life/Boovsland Noir'. After Tip saves her life, Sharzod becomes obsessed with repaying the debt, Private eye Kyle panics when Sharzod hires him to find her lost 'Mojo'.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Mom Genes'. When Grug takes Ugga hunting to find her inner growl again, she's as fierce as ever until coming face-to-face with a mom and baby too cute to catch.

programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Team Building'. Cleo, Akila, and Brian must demonstrate they make a great team, so Khepra doesn't split them up.

programme.title: Dragons - Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Edge Of Disaster Part 1'. Ruffnut is captured by Dragon Hunters. Is up to Astrid and Tuffnut to defend Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army.

programme.title: Home: Adventures With Tip And Oh!
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Struck Through The Heart/Boov Up And Drive'. Oh has an electric spark when he and Tip do the ultimate best friend handshake. Tip can't get Slushious back until she passes a Boovian Driver's Test.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Desert Scraptors'. When the Desert Scraptors mistakenly think Click-Clack is their leader, D-Structs' plan to have them attack Ty and the crew is derailed.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Desert Scraptors'. When the Desert Scraptors mistakenly think Click-Clack is their leader, D-Structs' plan to have them attack Ty and the crew is derailed.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody And Sherman Show
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Inside Hobson/Annie Oakley'. When Hobson's invention goes haywire, he shrinks - and swallows - Sherman so Peabody must travel through Hobson's body to save him while hosting show.

programme.title: Dragons - Race To The Edge
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Reign Of Fireworms'. Fireworms invade Dragon's Edge, while Ruffnut and Tuffnut discover that they have an unexpected connection to the island.

programme.title: George Of The Jungle
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Snoring/George's Day Off'. A mysterious pair of underpants brings good luck and George becomes the champion of his own game.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. In order to win the Fright Stuff Award, Casper consults his uncles for scaring advice.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - Noddy And The Sound Sucker'. The Goblins get a gizmo that sucks up sounds, but it gets full and bursts sending all the sounds to the wrong places. It's up to Noddy to fix the sounds and return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Joy!'. Olivia is determined to end the Prancer Dancers winning streak at he annual dance competition and forms her own rag-tag dance troupe and learns a thing or two about dancing for the pure joy of it.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - Why Aardvark Has A Sticky Tongue'. One day Aardvark gets his tongue stuck in a honey log, his friends help pull, until finally his tongue comes free. From that day on his tongue was long and sticky, perfect for eating.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E40 - Why Whale Spouts'. There was a huge storm in Tinga Tinga and a massive wave picked Whale up and carried her all the way to the waterhole. Elephant has an idea to help Whale get back to the ocean.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 - The Case Of The Sticker Mystery'. New stickers, with a picture of a mysterious bandit, have appeared in Toyland. Clockwork Mouse begs Noddy to investigate.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - The Birthday Thief/Junior Gets A Pet'. Motato is stealing birthdays with his evil De-Birthday-Ficator, Junior befriends a young 'Buffalorange,' but Ichabeezer wants to capture the animal.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E43 - Love Is In The Air'. Spring has sprung and love is in the air at Cosmos High. When the other pods pressure Sandra and Raffi to couple-up.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E44 - Cyranette'. A cute guy into comics mistakes Birch's artwork as Sandra's comic. When the ruse is revealed, he falls for Birch.

programme.title: 3-2-1 Penguins!
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. A gigantic space tornado threatens to destroy a peaceful little colony and Jason and the Penguins must jump into action to save the day.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - Home Alone/I'm Not A Hero'. Casper is punished by the headmaster for having helped an old lady carry her shopping bags. During a scare assignment, Casper can't resist rescuing a kitten.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Sword'. Dulcinea pulls a magical sword from a stone and becomes enchanted with heroic powers. Puss must help her learn how to control her new-found strength.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - One More Cup'. Julien finds a bag of coffee beans in the Cove of Wonders and gets the entire lemur community hooked on caffeine.

programme.title: Dreamworks The Epic Tales of...
programme.desc: 'Dreamworks The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants. S1/E10 - Captain Underpants and the Flustering Mindless Woe of the Flushable Memory Wipes'. George and Harold go into hiding after being made fun of.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Number One Problem'. After Boss Baby allows Gigi to potty train him, he realizes being nude might make him a better businessman, but Tim refuses to let that happen.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Three Trolls-Keteers/The Helper'. When a neighbour asks Guy for help to fight a monster, Guy mistakes it as an invitation to act in his play. Smidge sets out to help Troll Village but creates disastrous results.

programme.title: Turbo Fast
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Buster Move/Gills'. Smoove Move is embarrassed when his nerdy brother comes to visit, Skidmark causes a panic when he hunts a snail-eating goldfish at a fancy party.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Heavy Metal'. The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Postman Pat And The Eco Igloo'. Pat has a special delivery of ice for the school's North Pole project, but it's starting to melt and Mrs Goggins' recycling initiative becomes a traffic hazard.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Clangy Bangy Crocky'. Crocky has his foot stuck in a bucket and it makes lots of noise when he walks. But then he finds he can't get the bucket off.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Raa Raa's New Noise'. Raa Raa sets out to find the perfect noise to partner his friend Huffty in a tune.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 of 52 - Charley's Big Match'. Charley is referring to a football match between Nibblit and Bellarina, but their disagreements are just not funny. Charley must figure out how to get them to make up and play with each other.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 of 52 - Lights, Shoes, Nibblit'. Charley goes outside in the night-time to try out his new shoes with lights in their soles. They look fantastic in the dark, then he sees some other lights, but its only Nibblit in new shoes too.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 of 52 - Big Top Bellarina'. Charley wants to master a circus trick, but all the performers at the circus are better at tricks than he is. Then Charley pulls the greatest trick of all, saving Bellarina from up on the high wire.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Iced Out'. Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E14 - Postman Pat And The King's Armour'. It's Knights and Dragons Day and Pat's heading to a Welsh castle. Pat gets stuck in a suit of armour and returns to Greendale dressed like a knight.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E27 - Crocky's Wobbly Tooth'. Crocky has a wobbly tooth, but no matter what they do his friends just can't seem to help the tooth fall out.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E28 - The Littlest Laugh'. Ooo Ooo and Raa Raa try to find out who is the funniest animal in the Jingly Jangly Jungle.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Wind'. A fierce windstorm traps the gang inside the garage and they have fun together all night, but once the food runs out they team up to find a way out.

programme.title: George Of The Jungle
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Star Powell/Lil' Orphan Anteater'. The VegeMaster challenges George's title as king and George learns how to fly.

programme.title: Where's Wally?
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - A Wanderer's Christmas'. Odlulu tries to get on the nice list by 'helping' celebrations. Unfortunately, she makes things worse, so Waldo and Wenda need to tidy things up and save Christmas!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Boots'. Jack Sprat steals enchanted boots from the Treasure House and triggers a dangerous Devil Wind that threatens to consume San Lorenzo's treasure.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Back In Business
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Picture Perfect'. While the Templeton men are away on a dude's weekend camping trip, Staci and Jimbo team up to deliver a blankie to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Home: Adventures With Tip And Oh!
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Nuttypunny/Jealohsy'. Tip gets a tough lesson in sportsmanship playing Oh's favourite Boov game, Oh is racked by jealousy when he sees ex-flame Krunkle with another Boov.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Garden Of Eaten'. When Eep becomes a veg-a-eat-ian, the family hunts for the biggest vegetables they can find - until the plants attack and they're back to eating meat.

programme.title: Cleopatra In Space
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Do-Over'. Cleo attempts to use Brian's untested time machine to return to ancient Egypt, but gets caught in a time loop which may lead to the destruction of the entire universe.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: 'S9/E13 - There's No Business Like Snow Business'. The buyers head for the mountains and hit high altitude in Rimforest, where they face auctions in the snow. Mary weathers the storm as Casey tries to keep Rene's eyes on the prize.

programme.title: The Liquidator: Cash King
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Jaded'. When Jeff pulls a dirty trick on a competitor, will it save him a bunch of cash - or lose him a great deal?

programme.title: The Liquidator: Cash King
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Clean Sweep'. When Jeff buys a carful of clothes he doesn't want to help out a charity, will he be able to trick a greenhorn liquidator into getting him out of the deal?

programme.title: Salvage Kings
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - 3/1'. In the fast-paced, adrenaline-pumping job of tearing down buildings and racing against the clock to pull out anything valuable left behind.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Churchill Strikes Back'. Winter 1941 was a really bad time for the allies. The Germans had invaded to Soviet Union. Stalin was continuously screaming for a second front. Churchill wanted some kind of big success.

programme.desc: 'S2/E14'. We travel to Bruny Island to meet Charlie and Paul, two travellers that have been exploring Australia with just a car and tent to call their home. They are now looking for a more permanent address.

programme.title: Island of Bryan
programme.desc: 'S3/E23'. Contractor Bryan Baeumler, his wife Sarah and their family head to the Bahamas to overhaul a beachfront resort.

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: 'S4/E4'. Cathy and Vince strive to create a massive Italian style villa with a petanque court and heated pool. But their budget takes on a life of its own.

programme.title: Donal's Family Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Donal Skehan demonstrates the preparation of a wide variety of delicious dishes while providing various tips and techniques.

programme.title: Flat Out Fabulous
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Take one unloved rental and a group of housemates. For the cost of a night out, the queen of retro interiors transforms a dull living room into something flat-out fabulous.

programme.title: Escape To The Perfect Town
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Nicki Chapman is in the seaside town of Ayr, combing through its good-looking property stock and popular culture haunts. With £400,000 in their pocket, her buyers have pinpointed Ayr as a potential perfect town.

programme.title: Design For You
programme.desc: 'S6/E7'. We take a look at some of the best ways to create a warm and cosy environment in various rooms of the house.

programme.title: All About Property
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Get the ins and out on successful home loan applications, smart homes, and we profile, Midrand as Gauteng's property hotspot.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. Drew and Jonathan Scott are on a mission to help couples transform their current houses into forever homes-a place where they can put down roots and happily spend their lives.

programme.title: Dream Homes Revealed
programme.desc: Today on the show we will be looking at homes designed and built by their owners. We will discover the journey these builders and architects went on while creating their own dream home.

programme.title: The Home Team
programme.desc: 'S4/E5'. The team build a wine rack and glass holder utilising an up-cycled wooden box and Anthony shows you how to create a sustainable garden, and it's finally time for the bathroom reveal.

programme.title: Cheap Irish Homes
programme.desc: 'S2/E8'. Maggie Molloy is on a mission to find Ireland's cheapest homes

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. The family embarks on transforming the boys' bedrooms in their new-build classic English country house and outside the great British weather hits their plans for the pond.

programme.title: The Gardener
programme.desc: 'S21/E11'. Tanya shares ways to get more plants for less money. She'll also show you how to make a colourful cement paver with an imprint using large leaves.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Devon couple Steven and Jennie Flowers want to buy a holiday home that can also double up as a rental investment on the Western Costa Del Sol in Spain.

programme.title: Million Pound Properties
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - 1/3'. 22 year old Lily goes house hunting armed with a million pound trust fund and the owner of an ex-council flat in Chelsea dreams of a seven figure sale.

programme.title: Cash In The Spare Room
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. Georgina has spent £20,000 building an extension for her elderly parents but she now wants the space to also generate a second income.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: 'S24/E2'. Kirstie and Phil are scouring the South East, with two challenging searches. Phil encounters both tears of joy, and fears of price with the houses he shows them.

programme.title: Afrimaxx
programme.desc: 'S1/E15'. Discovering how artist such as Bankslave and Akudo are redefining the contemporary art scene is what Afrimaxx is here for. Take time to see how creatives are reviving the artistic landscape in Africa.

programme.title: Luxury Homes Revealed
programme.desc: 'S2/E15'. We kick off in the Hollywood Hills. Then we're off to New York as we go up and inside a four level luxury penthouse with breathtaking views of the Empire State Building.

programme.title: Wok vs Pot
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Have you ever wanted to create silky Italian pasta or soft and spongy rice noodles? Marion and Silvia are on the task as they turn them into delicious cannelloni and everybody's favourite, Pad see Yew.

programme.title: Australia's Best Houses
programme.desc: 'S8/E9'. Josh heads to the Sunshine Coast to experience a vibrant community and we see some developments that are pushing the boundaries of modern architecture.

programme.desc: 'S8/E165 of 238'. 'n Koerantberig het die hele Rutierbosch op hol. Lee-Ann kom agter hoe Carlo op mense se gevoelens speel en Justin bied sy dienste as DJ vir Elana aan.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E119 of 192'. Liam wend hom tot 'n dosent vir antwoorde, en Delia kry 'n verrassende uitnodiging. Jeremy en Ieva het 'n interessante eerste ontmoeting, en Zee en Karen moet kopskuiwe probeer maak.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E119 of 192'. Liam wend hom tot 'n dosent vir antwoorde, en Delia kry 'n verrassende uitnodiging. Jeremy en Ieva het 'n interessante eerste ontmoeting, en Zee en Karen moet kopskuiwe probeer maak.

programme.title: Fraksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 of 17'. Tim sukkel om sy pa te vertrou. Henk ontdek 'n fout in QPI wat katastrofies kan wees. Schalk reël 'n partytjie om almal op te beur. Jana vertel vir Schalk 'n geheim.

programme.title: Kwêla
programme.desc: 'S24/E33 of 48'. Ons hou Kia Makietie op Kroonstad, ontmoet 'n kampioenvegter van Kimberley, besoek 'n unieke begrafnisonderneming en gesels met kykNET-Rapport boekpryswenner, Gerda Taljaard.

programme.title: Groen: Kongo Reënwoud
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 of 13'. Tydens sy tweede besoek aan die Ba'Aka inwoners, word Dave diep die woud ingeneem en beleef 'n besondere ervaring wanneer jagters hom wys hoe tradisionele wapens gemaak word.

programme.title: Dankie, Lottoland
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 of 13'. TV- en radiopersoonlikheid Success Lekabe kuier by die De La Bat Skool vir Dowes in Worcester. Hier verras sy drie merkwaardige vroue met Lottoland-koeverte wat hoop gee.

programme.title: Kerkorrel: 20 Jaar Later
programme.desc: Hierdie film kyk na wat Johannes Kerkorrel gemaak het, wie hy was, sy impak op die kultuurwêreld en waarom mense twee dekades na sy dood steeds huldeblyke lewer.

programme.title: Die Boodskap: Vir Jou Lewensreis
programme.desc: 'S3/E199 of 286'. Inspirasie vir jou lewensreis vanuit Mosaïek gemeente. Saam met Jay Bezuidenhout verken ons geestelike IK.

programme.title: Die GROOT Ontbyt
programme.desc: 'S8/E80 of 137'. Aktualiteit, nuus, verkeer, weer en lekker Afrikaanse musiek is alles op die spyskaart, saam met #DieGrootOntbyt-span.

programme.title: Diepe Waters
programme.desc: 'S1/E28 of 86'. Iemand ontdek Zelda se geheim oor haar siekte. Sanet wil onmiddellik emigreer en Nina kry vir Johan terug.

programme.title: Winslyn
programme.desc: 'S9/E20 of 26'. Entrepreneur Divan Botha bespreek weekliks aktuele kwessies in die sake- en tegnologiewêreld deur plaaslike entrepreneurs en ontwikkelinge in die kollig te plaas. #DinamieseDinsdae

programme.title: Poena
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 of 26'. Poena is vreeslik ontsteld omdat hy as 'n medepligtige beskou word. Vis oorreed Poen om sy voorkoms te verander. Daar is groot probleme met die politieke onderbroeke advertensie.

programme.title: Bravo!
programme.desc: 'S12/E29 of 44'. Ons is by die bekendstelling van sjef Nic van Wyk se eerste resepteboek. Gesels met Brendan Peyper oor sy nuwe musiekvideo en woon 'n besonderse modeparade saam met aktrise Amalia Uys by.

programme.title: La't Wiel
programme.desc: 'S27/E6 of 13'. Haval se H6 GT is waarskynlik die beste Sjinese ryding wat ons nog bestuur het. Ons ontmoet Ford se splinternuwe Everest en soek 'n paar winskope op 'n gebruikte motorvloer.

programme.title: Wie's Nuus
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 of 26'. Die Springbok-losskakel Elton Jantjies se manewales op 'n vliegtuig en by 'n gastehuis in Mbombela het vir hoofopskrifte gesorg. Wie is hy en is sy loopbaan op die spel?

programme.title: Jan Braai Vir Erfenis
programme.desc: 'S12/E20 of 26'. Ons ondersoek aartappelslaai in baie diep, wye en ernstige maniere. Die balans in 'n aartappelslaai is tussen room, suur, sout, soet en ook tekstuur, kleur en geur.

programme.title: Spreekkamer
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 of 13'. Het die gebruik van plastiek regtig 'n effek op jou gesondheid? Ons vind meer uit. Ons gesels ook oor akupunktuur. En, ons ondersoek die verskille tussen outisme en Asperger-sindroom.

programme.title: Dankie, Lottoland
programme.desc: 'S6/E7 of 13'. TV- en radiopersoonlikheid Success Lekabe kuier by die De La Bat Skool vir Dowes in Worcester. Hier verras sy drie merkwaardige vroue met Lottoland-koeverte wat hoop gee.

programme.title: Die Real Housewives van Pretoria
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 of 14'. Thembi sluit by Kiki aan om te help met die huissoek, maar nou om iets te kry waarvan Malcolm ook sal hou. Dis die dag van Mel se Diamond Nail Day en nou wonder almal: gaan Peet opdaag?

programme.title: Prontuit
programme.desc: 'S9/E20 of 31'. Ons besoek die Gidshondvereniging van SA. Daar word veel meer gedoen as om gidshonde vir blindes op te lei.

programme.title: Ontbyt Grotes
programme.desc: 'S8/E15 of 28'. 'n Saamgestelde program wat die week se hoogtepunte van Die Groot Ontbyt bevat.

programme.title: Koppieteefontein
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 of 13'. 'n Hartsgesprek gebeur oor 'n koppie tee, 'n fontein is 'n plek van lewe, 'n samekoms... Met Koppieteefontein vereer aanbieder Jak de Priester fenomenale Suid-Afrikaners.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E166 of 238'. Justin probeer desperaat om 'n kontrak by Anker te kry, en Mymoena is raadop met AB wat aanhoudend op uitstappies wil gaan. Chris ontdek ontstellende inligting.

programme.title: eNuus

programme.title: Wanderlus

programme.title: Reminiscence
programme.desc: Hugh Jackman leads a great cast that drives this cerebral sci-fi. A case a private investigator of the mind is navigating becomes an obsession after his client disappears.

programme.title: Bad Teacher
programme.desc: A foul-mouthed seventh-grade teacher who is dumped by her sugar daddy starts to pursue a colleague, which causes conflict with the school's model teacher.

programme.title: Like Mike
programme.desc: A 14-year-old orphan becomes an NBA superstar after trying on a pair of sneakers with the faded initials 'MJ' inside.

programme.title: The Naturalist: The Life And Times...
programme.desc: 'The Naturalist: The Life And Times Of The Remarkable Marjorie Cortenay-Latime'. This doccie looks at a fish that was assumed to be extinct 66 million years ago and the woman who found it.

programme.title: Dear Elizabeth
programme.desc: A book-based comedy. A man living a boring life rediscovers more of himself and the true meaning of friendship while stalking an old college classmate on social media.

programme.title: Beyond Beyond
programme.desc: A great furry animation. While his father is away gathering provisions for their ship, young hare receives word about his long lost mother, so he embarks on an adventure.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Jack Black enters the mystic world of martial arts in this animated adventure. An obese, mild-mannered panda is thrown into the middle of a battle for the fate of China.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark Of The Moon
programme.desc: The stakes are high in this instalment of the franchise as the Autobots and Decepticons race to retrieve a Cybertronian spacecraft hidden on the moon and learn its secrets.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: A pulsating addition to the blockbuster franchise. A single mom and her kids arrive in a small town, discovering their connection to the Ghostbusters and their secret legacy.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2
programme.desc: A thrilling, adventure-filled sequel. Bored of life in the garden, Peter goes to the big city, where he meets shady characters and ends up creating chaos for the whole family.

programme.title: Transformers: Age Of Extinction
programme.desc: Michael Bay's larger-than-life franchise returns with more over-the-top action as a mechanic is thrust into a war between the Autobots, Decepticons and the government.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock and Channing Tatum team up for this rom-com adventure. A romance novelist and her cover model get swept up in a kidnapping that lands them in a jungle adventure.

programme.title: The Paper Tigers
programme.desc: Three Kung Fu prodigies have grown into washed-up, middle-aged men. But when their master is murdered, they must juggle their dead-end jobs, dad duties, and old grudges to avenge his death.

programme.title: Ted

programme.title: The Night Before
programme.desc: Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Seth Rogen and Anthony Mackie make up a hazardous trio of friends that turn Christmas on its head, in this heartfelt, chaos filled comedy.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A man has found his perfect woman, but she has short-term memory loss and can't remember him for more than a day. He does what a man in love does: he tries to win her affection every day.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: With a star-studded voice cast, this animation is about a journey of bravery and unexpected friendship as a dragon, a boy, and a mountain spirit look for a haven for dragons.

programme.title: Monster Family
programme.desc: Charming animated comedy. An unhappy family plan a fun night out, but everything backfires when an evil witch curses them and they all turn into monsters.

programme.title: The Skeleton's Compass
programme.desc: A fun family adventure film. When a 13-year-old boy finds a skeleton with a compass and a journal in the woods, he and his friends go on a time-travel adventure for lost gold.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Trucks and monsters come together to create a non-stop action adventure. A teenager forms a bond with a creature that's being hunted by an evil oil company and fights to save it.

programme.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy
programme.desc: Basketball icon LeBron James and the Looney Tunes team up for this epic sequel. After a rogue A.I. kidnaps his son, LeBron and the Toon Squad must win a game to get him back.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 2
programme.desc: The electrifying sequel to the hit movie based on the video game. When Dr Robotnik returns to Earth with a new ally, Knuckles, Sonic and his new friend Tails must stop them.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: The gang return for a musically-charged sequel. Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Die In A Gunfight
programme.desc: Fists and bullets fly in this modern-day Romeo and Juliet love story. When youngsters of two feuding families fall in love, violence erupts around them. Will their love win?

programme.title: The Many Saints Of Newark
programme.desc: Alan Taylor delivers the long-awaited prequel to the HBO hit The Sopranos. Witness Tony Soprano's rise to power through the influence of his family, especially his uncle.

programme.title: Infinite
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg and Chiwetel Ejiofor drive this book-inspired sci-fi action adaptation about a man who learns he's been reincarnated many times and holds the key to saving the world.

programme.title: One Shot
programme.desc: Scott Adkins and Ryan Phillippe star in this action thriller. While trying to rescue a prisoner, an elite squad of Navy SEALs finds themselves trapped when insurgents attack.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic Chinese historical action film centred on the heroic escapades of the legendary warrior Guan Yu in a nation torn apart by politics and civil conflict.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries #17...
programme.desc: 'Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Honeymoon, Honeymurder'. Aurora and Nick's pre-honeymoon is shattered in this film, as they must identify the killer after discovering a body.

programme.title: Special ID
programme.desc: It's incredible back-to-back action in this Donnie Yen film. A cop goes undercover to take down a gang leader, but he is betrayed by his former protégé and best friend.

programme.title: Remote Danger
programme.desc: In this thriller, a pregnant woman and her husband go on a remote counselling retreat. When they engage in intense bonding tasks, she begins to question her counsellor's motives.

programme.title: InSight
programme.desc: An exciting action-thriller about a clairvoyant counter-terrorism agent who travels to LA to investigate his brother's death. There, he teams up with a detective to seek justice.

programme.title: Fatal Frenemies
programme.desc: A suspenseful thriller. A mother tries to figure out who could have framed her daughter, who is accused of murdering a high school track teammate.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: In this action film, Jason Momoa does everything in his power to defend the ones he loves. A logger fights to protect his family from a dangerous group of drug runners.

programme.title: Escape Plan 2: Hades
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone returns for another round of action in this sequel. A security expert must save one of his own from the dangerous prison he once escaped from himself.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise Of Cobra
programme.desc: The 80s phenomenon, G.I. Joe, gets its own action-packed film. Dennis Quaid, Channing Tatum and Marlon Wayans are part of a special ops team that take on the evil group, Cobra.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: Oscar winner Angelina Jolie stars in this riveting spy thriller. Accused of being a Russian spy, Evelyn Salt goes on the run, using all her skills to stay one step ahead of the CIA.

programme.title: Kindred
programme.desc: An unsettling psychological thriller. When Charlotte is taken in by her boyfriend's family after his death, she soon suspects that they are only after her unborn child.

programme.title: Kindred
programme.desc: An unsettling psychological thriller. When Charlotte is taken in by her boyfriend's family after his death, she soon suspects that they are only after her unborn child.

programme.title: His Killer Fan
programme.desc: Jealousy is at the heart of this thriller, in which a young woman devises a devious plan when her best friend develops a romance with a rising musician.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge: A Hannah Swensen...
programme.desc: 'Sweet Revenge: A Hannah Swensen Mystery'. In this instalment of the Hannah Swensen mystery franchise, Hannah and Mike must plan their wedding while also solving a murder.

programme.title: The Escape Of Prisoner 614
programme.desc: This comedic modern-day Western stars Ron Perlman. In the hopes of regaining their jobs, two inept deputies attempt to track down an escaped prisoner.

programme.title: The Man In The Iron Mask
programme.desc: A swashbuckling adventure about twin brothers separated at birth, one becomes a debauched king, the other is imprisoned, and three Musketeers are determined to put matters right.

programme.title: The Last Victim
programme.desc: In this Neo-Western thriller, a sheriff seeks a group of outlaws after a horrifying crime. When a married couple crosses their path, everything spirals into violence and revenge.

programme.title: Takers
programme.desc: A notorious group of criminals find themselves up against a hardened detective when they attempt to pull off one last heist.

programme.title: Escape Plan: The Extractors
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone returns for another action-packed film. After Ray Breslin is hired to rescue the kidnapped daughter of a tech mogul, Breslin's girlfriend is also captured.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: Revenge is on the cards in this high-octane sequel to the hit film. After they're framed and the team is terminated, the surviving members must face off against a new enemy.

programme.title: Venom: Let There Be Carnage
programme.desc: Tom Hardy and Woody Harrelson face off in this thrilling sequel. After Eddie interviews the serial killer, Cletus Kasady, Kasady becomes the host of the deadly symbiote Carnage.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Kabayan'. Facing a setback with Luca's treatment, Thony takes matters into her own hands. But when a potential donor refuses to participate, she turns to Arman for help. Garrett makes a risky demand of Thony.

programme.desc: 'S3/E2 of 22 - Bowango'. It's wedding time! With a traditional Nigerian wedding approaching, the Wheelers are formally introduced to Abishola's family.

programme.title: Legacy
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 of 164'. Lexi makes a decision regarding her investment in Sims and Stefan's new company. Angelique is on the warpath of the new family threatening to uproot the Price fortune.

programme.desc: 'S8/E12 - Lights, Camera, Wipeout!'. Aerialists, UFO-ologists and puppeteers are all battling to be crowned the Wipeout champion and take home the $25,000 prize. Hosted by John Cena, Nicole Byer, Camille Kostek.

programme.title: The Block Australia

programme.title: Ordinary Joe
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 of 13 - Whiteout'. A winter blizzard forces each Joe to confront the limits of his own control. Music Joe goes full rock star mode while on tour alone. An unsavoury family secret threatens Cop Joe and Amy.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: 'S21/E3 - Filtered Life'. Bernard and Cosgrove investigate the disappearance of a social media star. Price and Maroun must weigh their decisions regarding the case against the wishes of the missing woman's family.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: 'S5/E12 of 14 - A Pink Cadillac And A Glorious...'. Sheldon attends his first comic book convention. Also, Mary tries selling make-up.

programme.title: MasterChef South Africa
programme.desc: 'S4/E9 of 20 - Mystery Hive'. Presented with an eclectic selection of ingredients, contestants struggle to hit the sweet spot. A surprise delivery adds to the buzz but leads to some confusion.

programme.title: Good Sam
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Natural Order'. Dr. Sam Griffith fights to keep her new leadership role as chief of surgery when her father and former boss, Dr. Rob 'Griff' Griffith, takes his case for reinstatement directly to the hospital board.

programme.title: We Own This City
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 of 6 - Part Two'. Jenkins learns stark truths about policing as a new officer. Rayam opens up about the GTTF. Suiter is assigned to a new murder case.

programme.desc: An unemployed man's life turns around when he wins the lottery, but as the saying goes, 'more money, more problems'.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Jackpot Mathambo

programme.title: Ukukhanya
programme.desc: A dedicated priest uproots his family from his hometown to embark on a mission to spread the word. His mission, however, puts excessive pressure on his family.

programme.title: The Radebes Part 1
programme.desc: Starring Sonia Mbele, this drama sees a long-buried family secret explode at a family reunion, leaving everyone with nothing else to do but pick up the pieces.

programme.title: Ezibiweyo
programme.desc: A young man is kidnapped and taken to an illegal circumcision school. Together with his fellow initiates, they must fight their way to freedom.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Jackpot Mathambo
programme.desc: An unemployed man's life turns around when he wins the lottery, but as the saying goes, 'more money, more problems'.

programme.title: Umfelokazi 2
programme.desc: After being punished for killing her husband, a young woman tries to re-enter civilian life as quietly as possible, that's until her hunger for revenge is triggered.

programme.title: Imbali
programme.desc: A young woman is getting married and her adoptive father is delighted. However, when her biological father arrives, a battle between the two fathers begins.

programme.title: Ifa Lethu
programme.desc: A grieving wife and mother is dealt a big blow when she discovers that her husband has been hiding a secret that could destroy the whole family.

programme.title: Tango
programme.desc: A talented dancer dreams of making it big, but his new dancing partner has other ideas.

programme.title: Uthando Lwababili
programme.desc: A young man is caught between his family and his opinionated girlfriend. Is he going to choose the woman of his dreams or stick to what his family wants for him?

programme.title: Isitha
programme.desc: An assassin is given a mission to take out his boss's enemy, but when he falls in love with the target, his boss decides it's time he's taught a lesson.

programme.title: Uthando Luka Baba
programme.desc: Two families have been enemies for years. When their children fall in love, old wounds are reopened.

programme.title: Istina
programme.desc: When Kanana's boyfriend proposes to her, she is over the moon. But then her boyfriend tells her that he wants his female friend to be his best man.

programme.title: Bafana Ba Bruno
programme.desc: Two brothers have to completely change their lifestyles in order to obtain their late father's inheritance.

programme.title: Qaphela
programme.desc: Lunga's father is refusing to accept him as his son, as he has special needs.

programme.title: Ma Chansa
programme.desc: A young man who works at a car wash is tired of being regarded as a loser in his neighbourhood. He starts using customers' cars to act like he has money.

programme.title: Force Of Nature
programme.desc: In this thriller, Mel Gibson is doing what he does best. Alongside Emile Hirsch and Kate Bosworth, he battles a gang of thieves seeking to pull off a heist during a hurricane.

programme.title: How High
programme.desc: Rappers Method Man and Redman drive this wacky classic comedy about two stoners. They smoke a magical herb that helps them gain acceptance to Harvard University.

programme.title: The Titan
programme.desc: Evolution is dangerous in this gripping sci-fi thriller. In a dystopian future, a military man participates in a genetic experiment designed to help humankind survive space.

programme.title: Kingdoms Of Fire, Ice & Fairytales
programme.desc: Explore three of Earth's epic wilderness in this film by the creators of the multi-award-winning wildlife documentary 'Stroop: Journey into the Rhino Horn War.'

programme.title: Adventures Of A Boy Genius
programme.desc: Miles Brown (Black-ish) drives this kid's movie. A twelve-year-old child prodigy teams up with a quirky retiree to solve a crime and save his family from splitting up.

programme.title: The Song Of Names
programme.desc: A touching book-inspired drama starring Tim Roth and Clive Owen. A middle-aged man travels around Europe trying to find his adopted brother who disappeared 40 years ago.

programme.title: Time Freak
programme.desc: Love is not bound by time in this Sophie Turner and Asa Butterfield film. After a break-up, a teenage genius creates a time machine to travel back and fix their relationship.

programme.title: Judy Moody And The Not Bummer Summer
programme.desc: It's adventure all the way in this film. A sister and her brother set out to have the most exciting summer with their fun loving aunt.

programme.title: The Son Of Bigfoot
programme.desc: A delightful animated adventure. A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father - only to discover that he's Bigfoot.

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: This biopic about race and identity won the Best Picture Oscar. An Italian-American bouncer becomes a driver for an African-American classical pianist touring the 1960s South.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: The ultimate revenge thriller. A young former stockbroker at a Mob-controlled Wall Street firm is on a deadly quest for vengeance after serving six years for a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: A Nice Girl Like You
programme.desc: This rom-com, starring Lucy Hale, was inspired by a best-selling book. When Lucy's ex accuses her of being too inhibited, she sets out a racy to-do list to prove him wrong.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: A wedding gets turned on its head in this outrageously funny comedy. A rivalry between a maid of honour and a bridesmaid for the bride's affection leads to all sorts of chaos.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: A wedding gets turned on its head in this outrageously funny comedy. A rivalry between a maid of honour and a bridesmaid for the bride's affection leads to all sorts of chaos.

programme.title: No Escape

programme.title: Lady Driver
programme.desc: A feisty motorsports drama. When a rebellious teen embarks on a journey to connect with her roots, she finds herself in a new world, geared up for the ride of her life.

programme.title: Mermaid Princess
programme.desc: An animation filled with love and adventure. A mermaid must help save her home from those who threaten to destroy it.

programme.title: The Island

programme.title: Bloody Tales Of The Tower
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Executions'. Joe Crowley and Dr Suzannah Lipscomb investigate executions held in the Tower of London, including the botched beheading of Charles II's son.

programme.title: Drain The Oceans
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - The Great Barrier Reef'. The mysterious sinking of Australia's 'Titanic', a warship on a dangerous mission, and a ROV expedition searching for clues at the bottom of the reef.

programme.title: Alaska: The Next Generation
programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - The Monster'. Rural Alaskans must prepare in order to survive through a cold and bitter winter as it quickly approaches.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay: Uncharted Showdown
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Wales Tales'. Gordon explores Wales - from its rural interior to its rugged coastal waters - to learn how its working-class roots are shaping an emerging food scene.

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: 'S6/E10 - Backstabbed In Thailand'. Military veteran Kim Hood faced a life behind bars in a squalid Thai prison after being caught smuggling 14 kilos of heroin with a friend.

programme.title: First Alaskans
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Lone Wolf'. Generations of Indigenous peoples have thrived in harsh arctic climates because of their knowledge and stewardship of the land.

programme.title: To Catch A Smuggler
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Inside Job'. HSI investigates a ring of airline employees smuggling drugs through JFK, and CBP suspects that a passenger is smuggling drugs in her shoes.

programme.title: Science Of Stupid Compilations
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Science Of Stupid Trends'. Trends come and go, but science never goes out of style - watch how the Ice Bucket Challenge can go terribly wrong and what is up with paddleboarding.

programme.title: Science Of Stupid Compilations
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Science of Stupid Aquatics'. Dallas Campbell introduces clips of all things liquid as fearless individuals and animals demonstrate what not to do with water.

programme.title: Science Of Stupid
programme.desc: 'S7/E6 of 20'. In this episode we learn the science behind the fails, when attempting to flambe dinner, riding a balance bike or confronting a Dust Devil.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 of 10 - VW Karmann Ghia'. Tim and Fuzz pick up car Lee's imported 1965 VW Karmann Ghia. The car is a stylish German classic that has seen better days.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 of 19 - French Fries & Frozen Pizza'. Follow the trajectory of McDonald's French Fries, Cracker Jack makes candy by the truckload, a pizza factory grinds 6-million pounds of cheese a year.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 of 19 - Turducken & Mustard'. Learn the secret behind America's favorite mustard, meet the workers who stitch together Turduckens, and 20 tons of gooey caramel a day go into Affy Tapples caramel apples.

programme.title: First Alaskans
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 of 8 - The Lone Wolf'. Generations of Indigenous Peoples have thrived in harsh arctic climates because of their knowledge and stewardship of the land.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: 'Air Crash Investigation: Special Report. S3/E7 of 10 - Death From Above'. Mid-air tragedies are particularly horrifying when they occur over a community, and rain terror on the people below.

programme.title: Science Of Stupid
programme.desc: 'S2/E25 of 30 - Wall Crashes And Rollerblades'. In this episode we learn just how many ways there are to embarrass and injure oneself when rotating on a pommel horse, running through walls and jumping whilst wearing rollerblades.

programme.title: Science Of Stupid
programme.desc: 'S2/E26 of 30 - Break Dances And Skateboards'. In this episode we learn just how many ways there are to embarrass and injure oneself when climbing a lamp post, busting a break dance move and riding an off road skateboard.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: 'S10/E10 of 20 - The Next Generation'. In one of the toughest Wicked Tuna seasons, can the next generation of Gloucester fishermen rise to the challenge and bring home blue gold?

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 of 19 - Jerky, Brownies & Sugar Cubes'. Discover the preferred outer space protein among astronauts, watch as raw sugar is made into Domino's sugar cubes, and brownies are baked in a Ferris wheel-style oven.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 of 19 - Pretzels & Cookies'. Meet the famous cookies that make millions for charity, an ice cream sandwich combining vanilla and chocolate, and see the HQ of cheese-filled pretzel pockets.

programme.desc: 'S6/E6 of 10 - Triumph GT6'. Tim and Fuzz pick up Andrew's 1971 Triumph GT6, a classic British two seater sports car. This sleek coupe was Triumph's answer to its rival MGB GT and is now a desirable classic.

programme.title: First Alaskans
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 of 8 - Sign Of Good Luck'. Alaska's Indigenous Peoples face new challenges as arctic resources that have been relied on for centuries begin to disappear.

programme.desc: Full View makes sense of all the news of the day. The show also features 30 minutes of market sense in depth.

programme.title: The Globe
programme.desc: The Globe is recapping on everything that happened in the country and beyond. It includes live coverage of global news through our foreign news agencies.

programme.title: The Watchdog
programme.desc: For incisive, probing, public-service journalism stay tuned to The Watchdog where public officials, leaders of corporate South Africa and other entities are put on the platform to account to the public they serve or cater to.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Morning Live focuses on what South Africans are waking up to on the day. The show carries the Diary for the day, Market Sense, General News, Crime and Courts issues, Political issues, Sports News, Live weather and traffic reports.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: Agenda breaks down the stories of the day, as set in Morning Live, in more detail and giving stories more substance as the story develops. These stories take news agenda forward.

programme.title: On Point
programme.desc: On Point follows the development of the general news of the day in-depth where the show informs viewers on the further developments on the stories. This is a blended segment with 2 hours of general news and markets segment for an hour.

programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E92 - Sentibubbler'. Shadow Moth creates Sentibubbler, a fearsome sentimonster that will only stop if Rena Rouge betrays Ladybug and Cat Noir!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E93 - 4/93'. Ladybug and Cat Noir face Glaciator again. Glaciator annoys Ladybug by insisting that the superheroes are in love.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E94 - Hack San'. What if Marinette had no choice but to leave Paris on the day when Shadow Moth decided to create a new supervillain?

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Uncaged'. Nancy returns and Cricket and Tilly are pleased to see her, but Bill and Gramma are worried she'll be a bad influence on the kids.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Crush, Chop & Burn Part 1'. When 14 year old Leo moves into his new stepdad's mansion, he snoops around and discovers Adam, Bree and Chase - three bionic siblings living in a lab beneath the house.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Crush, Chop & Burn Part 2'. Davenport makes robot Lab Rats to replace the real ones at school, but the Lab Rats swap places with them. What will happen when the clones are to be crushed?

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Being Bella'. Bella is now a statuette. Tara must make Cam fall for Bella so he will kiss her to make her human again. But the only way she can do that is to pretend to be Bella...

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - The Science of Seb'. Esmerelda and Lacie plot to destroy the love between Sorsha and Seb, thus allowing the third Founder to take her over. They turn their dark spider into a beautiful girl. Will Seb be able to resist her?
