programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Four young friends bound by a tragic accident are reunited when they find themselves being stalked by a hook-wielding maniac.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: He's seven feet tall, bright red, and he's got horns and a tail. And he's out to fight the forces of evil.

programme.title: Dead Calm
programme.desc: A peaceful voyage for a couple turns into a fight for survival when they rescue a murderous drifter from the dead calm sea.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: A television producer tries to get the scoop on a small-town pizzeria owner after he inherits $40 billion.

programme.title: Hard To Kill
programme.desc: Detective Mason Storm stumbles onto a high-level political corruption scheme, his family is murdered and he is left for dead.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: A guy relies on his newly-acquired gladiator skills to save his ex-girlfriend from kidnappers.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Coerced into working for a crime boss, a talented, young getaway driver must face the music when a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: The Young Kieslowski
programme.desc: Two nerdy Caltech students hook up and end up on a journey throughout California after they find out one is pregnant with the other's twins.

programme.title: Zombieland
programme.desc: The most frightened guy on Earth leads a motley crew of survivors in a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Murder At 1600
programme.desc: A cop investigating a brutal killing at the White House makes some shocking discoveries that go all the way up to the highest levels of government.

programme.title: Under Siege 2: Dark Territory
programme.desc: Maniacal techno-expert Travis Dane hijacks a train and converts it into a command center.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail Of Blood
programme.desc: TNT unleashes an action driven, pulse raising slate, mixed with romantic gems and hilarious comedy aimed to keep its audiences glued to their screens!

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Half human, half vampire, his mission is to save humanity, but Deacon Frost is in his way and he's summoning the 'Blood God'.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: Half human, half vampire, his mission is to save humanity, but Deacon Frost is in his way and he's summoning the 'Blood God'.

programme.title: Never Back Down
programme.desc: A rebellious teen starts at a new school. Aided by a mixed martial arts specialist he prepares to take on his biggest challenge so far.

programme.title: The Debt Collector
programme.desc: A trained martial artist goes to work as a mob debt collector. The job seems easy enough, until a client drags him into a deeper situation deeper.

programme.title: Frantic
programme.desc: A doctor finds that his wife has disappeared and soon finds himself caught up in a world of intrigue, espionage, gangsters, drugs and murder.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome To The Jungle
programme.desc: Four teenagers can hardly believe it when they are pulled into a video game.

programme.title: The Next Karate Kid
programme.desc: Hilary Swank stars as a troubled teenage girl who trains with the legendary Mr Miyagi to become the next karate kid.

programme.title: Deadtectives
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators from TV go to Mexico's most haunted house in the pursuit of ratings.

programme.title: Trauma Center
programme.desc: An injured young woman must escape a pair of vicious killers who are after the only piece of evidence that can implicate them in a grisly murder.

programme.title: Rush Hour
programme.desc: The fastest hands in the East meet the biggest mouth in the West when legendary martial arts daredevil Jackie Chan teams with comedic powerhouse Chris Tucker in Rush Hour.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A gangster that everyone believed to be dead mysteriously reappears to avenge himself upon his former boss and find his missing son.

programme.title: Ninja Assassin
programme.desc: Raizo is taken from the streets as a child and transformed into a trained killer by the Ozunu Clan.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: 'S11/E9 - Devil's Triangle'. Steve and Amy travel to Pittsburgh to investigate paranormal activity in a tattoo parlour where the artists and customers fear for their safety.

programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - I See It Landing'. Colton is fishing on a lake when something in the woods catches his eye. Is he being stalked by a pale humanoid creature?

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - American Nazis'. From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorised the USA in the 1930s.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Legend Of The Skinwalker'. A recent creature sighting outside the infamous Skinwalker Ranch brings Chuck and the team to Utah to investigate. Evidence indicates it might be an alien.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E1 - Close Encounters'. Josh Gates starts his extra-terrestrial search with a visit to NASA and an alien-hunting expedition in Chile, where scientists make new discoveries.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Accidental Mummies And Roswell'. Don Wildman uncovers the secret behind dozens of perfectly preserved mummies in Mexico. And he investigates the world's most-famous UFO conspiracy.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Lizzie Borden And Bigfoot'. Don Wildman investigates the greatest unsolved murder in American history. Plus, he reveals a crucial piece of evidence in the hunt for Bigfoot.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Murder On The Prairie'. A series of strange animal deaths and UFO sightings brings Chuck to Colorado. Reports of authorities ignoring these incidents suggest a government cover-up.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - American Nazis'. From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorised the USA in the 1930s.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Legend Of The Skinwalker'. A recent creature sighting outside the infamous Skinwalker Ranch brings Chuck and the team to Utah to investigate. Evidence indicates it might be an alien.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Las Vegas'. Why was Las Vegas a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for Atomic Bombs, and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists?

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - UFO Recovery'. Chuck receives a map supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on an epic treasure to find them.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Mummy Curse And Nazi Art Hoax'. Don Wildman investigates a deadly pharaoh's curse. Plus, he reveals the truth behind a secret operation to sell phony art to the Nazis.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Mastodon Murder And Cleopatra'. Don Wildman recounts a tale of money, mastodons and murder. He also reveals how a priceless ancient Egyptian artifact was almost lost at sea.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - UFO Recovery'. Chuck receives a map supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on an epic treasure to find them.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Social Clusters'. An ongoing series of UFO sightings off the Southern California coastline leads Chuck and the team to examine the link between UFOs, the military and the ocean.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E2 - Ancient Visitors'. Josh is on Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe aliens visited millennia ago. And, he goes meteorite hunting in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - The Earth Next Door'. Astronomers detect a potentially habitable planet tantalizingly close to Earth. A chance discovery at NASA reveals a top secret military space program.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Today Is The End'. Jack attempts to convince his parents that lizard people are real. Plus, the Osbournes get chills watching ghostly photobombs, a fleet of UFOs and a mutant shark.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - The Trunk'. Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey visit a museum in Florida. Reports of multiple attacks on volunteers have sparked the need for a paranormal investigation.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - UFO Recovery'. Chuck receives a map supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on an epic treasure to find them.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - There's No Place Like Storo'. The miners have their first target on Storø. Finding accessible targets within close distance to the camp is crucial for the success of the expedition.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Ancient Astronauts'. Did aliens help build the Pyramids? Or does the 'ancient astronauts' idea go back to Swiss author Erich von Daniken, whose books challenge religion and science?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E2 - Ancient Visitors'. Josh is on Easter Island, where ancient alien theorists believe aliens visited millennia ago. And, he goes meteorite hunting in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - American Nazis'. From the rallies held at Madison Square Garden, to the plots to steal the secrets to the nation's weapons of war, the American Nazis terrorised the USA in the 1930s.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Legend Of The Skinwalker'. A recent creature sighting outside the infamous Skinwalker Ranch brings Chuck and the team to Utah to investigate. Evidence indicates it might be an alien.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E1 - Close Encounters'. Josh Gates starts his extra-terrestrial search with a visit to NASA and an alien-hunting expedition in Chile, where scientists make new discoveries.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Skull Of Doom And Dracula'. Don Wildman investigates a UFO crash in the heart of the Wild West. Plus, he reveals the true story behind the world's most notorious vampire.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E13 - Lady Godiva'. Don Wildman treks to the UK to visit a statue honouring bare-cheeked bravery. He also visits a Brooklyn cemetery to investigate the death of a psychic.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Legend Of The Skinwalker'. A recent creature sighting outside the infamous Skinwalker Ranch brings Chuck and the team to Utah to investigate. Evidence indicates it might be an alien.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Fractured'. High on his discovery with the Feldman's at the now named 'Americo Creek,' Americo reports back to the team at the miners meeting that he found 12 flakes of gold.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Founding Fathers'. Discovers which of America's founding fathers used sex as an instrument of diplomacy and which one secretly scoffed at the divinity of Jesus.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Arizona Anomalies'. A recent UFO sighting in Phoenix leads Chuck and the team to Sedona, AZ. They explore whether the area's energy vortexes act as portals for otherworldly visitors.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for...
programme.desc: 'Expedition Unknown: Hunt For Extraterrestrials. S1/E3 - UFOs Over England'. In Zimbabwe Josh interviews witnesses to one of the largest ever UFO sightings. Then, in England, he examines a case known as 'Europe's Roswell.'

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Bobby Mackey's Music World'. Jack Osbourne and Katrina Weidman travel to Wilder, Kentucky, to visit a honky-tonk. It is considered by many to be the most haunted place on earth.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Monsters Of The Deep'. Paul Beban searches for the truth about sea monsters. He travels to Vermont's Lake Champlain to see if an unclassified creature lurks in its dark depths.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Believer'. Ozzy and Sharon sit down to watch footage of suspected poltergeists, haunted dolls and UFOs. Can Jack convince his parents that these supernatural forces exist?

programme.desc: 'S5/E205'. Bukhosi realises he's not at the top of the food chain and Zweli can't believe his luck.

programme.title: The Bachelorette
programme.desc: 'S19/E5'. Gabby, Rachel and their 14 remaining men continue their seaside journey across Europe. Later, Logan decides to confess feelings that send the ship, and our leading ladies, spinning.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Petré en Carina Prins en leer hoe hierdie hardwerkende Suid-Afrikaners 'n vervalle ou Franse huisie omskep in 'n oase van rustigheid.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Privaatspeurder Luke Enslin vertel hoe hy as polisiespeurder in die vroeë 2000's georganiseerde misdaad in Pretoria help bekamp het.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Dané en Leandri is weer bo-aan die punteleer. Op dag agt moet die vroue wys elke trouvrou kan óók 'n tawwe koekie wees met een van die taaiste uitdagings nog. Sal Chanté en Mary Jane regtig kan 'saamstem om nie saam te stem nie'?

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Dr. Elna gee advies oor die behoud van ereksies onder ouer mans. 'n Ouer wil weet hoe hulle homoseksualiteit vir hul kinders se maats kan verduidelik.

programme.title: Kelderklas
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Die Heuwels Fantasties maak 'n draai in Steenber. Ons gaan letterlik berg-op by Beau Constantia, baie wyn word geproe en JP ontdek die beste mashie-gholfbaan in Suid-Afrika.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk

programme.title: Meer As Grond

programme.title: Nisboere

programme.title: Tuin-Toere

programme.title: Meer As Grond

programme.title: Agter Tralies

programme.title: Zolile
programme.desc: A quiet boy resorts to herding cows after dropping out of school due to being teased by other children. Unknown to his peers, his shyness masks an impressive IQ.

programme.desc: A film about a hip-hop and blues collective who play in the inner city. With a huge following, they have become an inspiration to those around them.

programme.title: Lingashoni

programme.desc: 'S1/E6 of 13'. Two traumatic experiences led Magiva to losing his vision. Magiva received a sum of R2.8 million. He blew it on lavish parties and women. He gets a second chance and can become a musician.

programme.desc: Ndabezitha Mahlangu mediates in the case of Victoria, who bought a house from Linah and is now demanding her money back. There's also the case of Betty, who's being accused of being a witch.

programme.title: Froggies
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 of 20'. Auntie Hop the frog tells stories that make you sit up and listen. Her chatty little frog companions can't get enough of her stories about the African animal kingdom.

programme.title: Dee Dee & Spike
programme.desc: 'S1/E39 of 260'. Dee Dee and Spike, the children's dance series: Each episode takes you to a fun place and teaches children playful dance moves, whilst building on their vocabulary.

programme.title: Rat-Tat-Tat

programme.title: My Top 10: My Life In Music

programme.title: Isithembiso

programme.title: Gomora

programme.title: Date My Family

programme.title: Gomora

programme.title: The Queen

programme.title: Becoming...
